title: cyanea coriacea
intro: Cyanea coriacea, also known as the Hawaiian coral tree or coral hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to Hawaii. The medicinal properties of Cyanea coriacea lie in its leaves and flowers, which contain anthocyanins and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. Cyanea coriacea can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to promote overall health and well-being.
